raw.subject: Something I noticed about Stylin' Nails & Spa
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the new nail polish colors you showcased on your page, especially the Winter Delight collection - the shades are stunning! It's clear you're passionate about bringing the latest trends to your Springfield clients.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be making it harder for new customers to find and book appointments directly with you.

I sketched out a simple page idea based on your Facebook posts and photos - I included a services menu, work gallery, and a booking CTA, which you can see here: https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/stylin-nails-spa-springfield

It's a straightforward project to build out a site like this for local businesses like yours. Would you like to discuss details or get a quote for a flat fee? You can reply or I'd be happy to schedule a quick call.
